config: carousel grouped fan=4, RAM rerank C=1000, Cohere 1M x 1024. Codes now DEFAULT to rotation x2 + residual (recall ~0.998 per 051, identical code path) - the carousel serves the real engine, not plain binary.
note: Made the carousel default to the best codes (rotation+residual wired into its scan; rerank stays exact on raw f32). Two results: (1) rotation+residual compose into the carousel FOR FREE - latency envelope identical to plain-binary 041, now at recall ~0.998 instead of 0.89 (confirms they are zero-scan-cost code-formation knobs, orthogonal to serving). (2) A FIXED fan cliffs: fan=4 holds to ~600 QPS (12.6ms p50) then collapses at 800 (672ms) - matching 041, where optimal fan drops with load. So a single fixed fan cannot cover the load range without a cliff -> the adaptive fan-out controller (F=cores/in-flight, live) is REQUIRED, not optional, to realize the no-cliff envelope at recall 0.998.
